body:
The diagnostic is based on a buoyancy differential. I used a default 3e-5, which is the recommended potential density difference 0.03 (see for example [Treguier et al 2023](https://gmd.copernicus.org/articles/16/3849/2023/)) divided by a reference density ~1e3.

We should add a test and also limit by the static column depth from Oceananigans, @simone-silvestri maybe you can look this over.

I also added an example which is not literated, but we could consider literating it.
title: Updates diagnostic for computing mixed layer depth

body: I can't really think of a case where we would want more than one major basin, let alone an infinite number of basins!
title: Change default major basins to 1 in `regrid_bathymetry`
